productName: Fugu - T1 - Hash Rosin - Cookie Krisp - (DOH) - 1g
description: A purist's hybrid hash rosin: Cookie Krisp refined first into full-melt hash, then squeezed solventless under heat and pressure for the cleanest, most flavorful dab going. A true craft dab, a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience.
